item_id.	43
name_identJP.	木片
name_identEN.	wood chip
item_desc1JP.	\t\t破砕された木の欠片。全く役に立たないが、子供の興味を引くくらいにはなるだろう。\n#～子供を騙す１００のテクニック・お土産編～\n
item_desc2JP.	
item_desc3JP.	
item_desc4JP.	\t\t破損した木の破片だ。\n#～鑑定報告書：＜廃品＞カテゴリ～\n
item_desc1EN.	\t\tFragments of crushed wood. Entirely useless, but it might be good to catch a child's interest.\n#~100 Ways to Deceive Kids - Presents~\n

item_desc3EN.	
item_desc4EN.	\t\tPieces of a damaged tree. Not dry enough to burn easily.
